step_by_step_thinking: I agree with the assessment provided by agent1. raw_response:
I agree with the assessment provided by agent1. Additionally, understanding that the sarcomere includes all parts of the myofilament apparatus necessary for contraction makes it clear why option C is correct. Disagreement would stem from misunderstanding the role of specific components such as the H-zone where only structural support proteins exist without active contracting filaments.
